ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the employee is located in */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee (e.g., CSR, Manager) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Overall performance rating of the employee */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the department is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "culture" TEXT /* Cultural information relevant to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee the metric is associated with */,
  "aht" INTEGER /* Average handling time (AHT) in seconds */,
  "adherence" INTEGER /* Percentage of adherence to schedule */,
  "quality" INTEGER /* Quality score out of 100 */,
  "knowledge" INTEGER /* Knowledge score out of 100 */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "customer_feedback_score" INTEGER /* Average customer feedback score */,
  "training_needs" TEXT /* Summary of training needs identified during the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_metrics" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target metric */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the target is set for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the target is set for */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., AHT, Adherence, Quality, Knowledge) */,
  "target_value" INTEGER /* Target value for the metric */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the target period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the target period */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_metrics_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Manager, CSR) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Level of the role (e.g., 1 for Admin, 2 for Manager, 3 for CSR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user access entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
